fault_hypothesis: The overlap check on line 62 uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), which incorrectly permits new time windows that touch the boundaries of existing ones. The failing tests expect touching boundaries to be treated as conflicts.

spec.expr: not any(b__1 == s or a__1 == e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: A window that is not rejected as overlapping must not be touching any existing window's boundary.

spec.expr: all(b__1 != s for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The new window's end time must not be equal to the start time of any existing booking.

spec.expr: all(a__1 != e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The new window's start time must not be equal to the end time of any existing booking.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or all(__cbfl_result[1][i][1] < __cbfl_result[1][i+1][0] for i in range(len(__cbfl_result[1]) - 1))

constraints.intent: If a booking is successful, the updated timeline must not have any touching or overlapping slots.
